title: helia nerioides
intro: Helia nerioides, also known as Helianthus neriifolius, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family that is native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Helia nerioides include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in natural medicine.
